recommendations.title: The Life of David Gale
recommendations.overview: A man against capital punishment is accused of murdering a fellow activist and is sent to death row.

recommendations.title: Pink Floyd: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A troubled rock star descends into madness in the midst of his physical and social isolation from everyone.

recommendations.title: Fame
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the lives of several teenagers who attend a New York high school for students gifted in the performing arts.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Birdy
recommendations.overview: Two young men are seriously affected by the Vietnam War. One of them has always been obsessed with birds - but now believes he really is a bird, and has been sent to a mental hospital. Can his friend help him pull through?

recommendations.title: Angel Heart
recommendations.overview: A down-and-out Brooklyn detective is hired to track down a singer on an odyssey that will take him through the desperate streets of Harlem, the smoke-filled jazz clubs of New Orleans, and the swamps of Louisiana and its seedy underworld of voodoo.

recommendations.title: Midnight Express
recommendations.overview: Billy Hayes is caught attempting to smuggle drugs out of Turkey. The Turkish courts decide to make an example of him, sentencing him to more than 30 years in prison. Hayes has two opportunities for release: the appeals made by his lawyer, his family,

recommendations.title: Evita
recommendations.overview: The hit musical based on the life of Evita Duarte, an Argentinian actress who eventually became the wife of Argentinian president Juan Perón, and the most beloved and hated woman in Argentina.

recommendations.title: The Road to Wellville
recommendations.overview: An unhappy young couple visit the infamous Kellogg spa in Battle Creek, Michigan while a young hustler tries get into the breakfast-cereal business and compete against John Kellogg's corn flakes.

recommendations.title: Angela's Ashes
recommendations.overview: An Irish Catholic family returns to 1930s Limerick after a child's death in America. The unemployed I.R.A. veteran father struggles with poverty, prejudice, and alcoholism as the family endures harsh slum conditions.
